name: C-18 single-control mode writes stale-beyond-fetch-frequency status when marker is stale per §2.17 enum
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && printf '2026-04-01T00:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/soc2-tsc.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/control-mapping-gate.sh" --framework soc2-tsc --control-id CC1.1 --fetch-frequency weekly --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit-status s.json; grep -q 'stale-beyond-fetch-frequency' s.json && echo stale 1>&2
